_comment: COVERAGE GAP (Forseti-format-pending): NCIC_ID, LEID, HART_CASE_ID, HART_SUBJECT_ID patterns are absent -- real CJIS compliance requires these formats from Forseti. Until supplied the gate catches SSN/PHONE/EMAIL/DOB/NAME_NARRATIVE/ADDRESS but is blind to NCIC numbers, LEIDs, and HART case/subject IDs. Declared in blocked_categories so the gate emits a machine-readable warning on every run. Action: file a Forseti request, add real regex formats, remove the category from blocked_categories.

allowlist.description: Keel project author domain -- strip before scanning to allow marketplace display
matellio.com project domain -- strip before scanning
GHA uses-directive CI version pins are not PII
npm scoped package ref with embedded slash is not PII
Semver version pins are not PII -- digit-only version string is not a domain
RFC 2606 reserved documentation domains never contain real PII
.local TLD is non-routable per RFC 6762 -- test fixtures and dev infrastructure only
npm glob-package deprecated-notice -- maintainer ref in package-lock.json not CJIS data
